# Baseline frontmatter contract for /interflux:flux-explore <target> WITHOUT --teams
# This file is the no-regression check for F2 (sylveste-3xl3.1.5).
# When --teams is NOT passed, the synthesis frontmatter MUST contain exactly these keys (and no others):
artifact_type: brainstorm
bead: <CLAVAIN_BEAD_ID or "none">
method: flux-explore
target: "<target>"
rounds: <int>
total_agents: <int>
date: <YYYY-MM-DD>

# Keys that MUST NOT appear in the without-teams frontmatter:
# - teams_used
# - teams_fallback
# - synthesis_cost_usd
# - synthesis_quality_check
# - transcript

# File path contract:
# Synthesis written to docs/brainstorms/{YYYY-MM-DD}-flux-explore-{slug}.md
# Specs preserved at .claude/flux-gen-specs/{slug}-round-{1..N}.json
# No new files created when --teams is not requested.
